emodbus_rtu_client_create.message0: Create Modbus RTU client %1 RS485 control pin %2
emodbus_rtu_client_create.tooltip: To create a Modbus RTU client instance, you need to specify the DE/RE control pin of the RS485 module

emodbus_rtu_client_begin.message0: Start RTU client %1 Serial port %2 Baud rate %3 RX pin %4 TX pin %5
emodbus_rtu_client_begin.tooltip: Start the Modbus RTU client and configure the serial port and pins

emodbus_tcp_client_begin.tooltip: Start Modbus TCP client background task

emodbus_tcp_client_set_target.message0: Set TCP client %1 Target server IP %2 Port %3
emodbus_tcp_client_set_target.tooltip: Set the IP address and port of the Modbus TCP server

emodbus_client_on_data.tooltip: Set the data receiving callback function and execute it when the response is received

emodbus_client_on_error.message0: When an error occurs on the client side %1
emodbus_client_on_error.tooltip: Set an error handling callback function to be executed when a communication error occurs

emodbus_read_holding_registers.message0: Client %1 Read holding register Slave ID %2 Starting address %3 Quantity %4
emodbus_read_holding_registers.tooltip: Read the holding register asynchronously (function code 0x03), and the result is returned through the callback

emodbus_read_input_registers.message0: Client %1 Read input register Slave ID %2 Starting address %3 Quantity %4
emodbus_read_input_registers.tooltip: Read the input register asynchronously (function code 0x04), and the result is returned through the callback

emodbus_read_coils.message0: Client %1 Read coil Slave ID %2 Starting address %3 Quantity %4
emodbus_read_coils.tooltip: Asynchronously read the coil status (function code 0x01), and the result is returned through callback

emodbus_read_discrete_inputs.message0: Client %1 Read discrete input Slave ID %2 Starting address %3 Quantity %4
emodbus_read_discrete_inputs.tooltip: Asynchronously read discrete input (function code 0x02), the result is returned through callback

emodbus_write_single_register.message0: Client %1 Write to single register Slave ID %2 Address %3 Value %4
emodbus_write_single_register.tooltip: Write to a single holding register (function code 0x06)

emodbus_write_single_coil.message0: Client %1 writes to a single coil Slave ID %2 Address %3 Value %4
emodbus_write_single_coil.tooltip: Write to a single coil (function code 0x05), the value is 0 (OFF) or 1 (ON)

emodbus_write_multiple_registers.message0: Client %1 Write multiple registers Slave ID %2 Starting address %3 Value array %4

emodbus_sync_read_holding_registers.message0: Client %1 Synchronously read holding register Slave ID %2 Address %3
emodbus_sync_read_holding_registers.tooltip: Synchronously read a single holding register and return the value (function code 0x03)

emodbus_sync_read_input_register.message0: Client %1 Synchronously read input register Slave ID %2 Address %3
emodbus_sync_read_input_register.tooltip: Synchronously read a single input register and return the value (function code 0x04)

emodbus_sync_read_coil.message0: Client %1 Synchronously read coil Slave ID %2 Address %3
emodbus_sync_read_coil.tooltip: Synchronously read the status of a single coil and return the value (function code 0x01)

emodbus_response_get_uint16.message0: Get the %1th register value (16 bits) from the response
emodbus_response_get_uint16.tooltip: Read the 16-bit register value at the specified position (starting from 0) from the callback response

emodbus_response_get_float.message0: Get the %1th floating point value (32 bits) from the response
emodbus_response_get_float.tooltip: Read the 32-bit floating point value at the specified position from the callback response (occupies 2 registers)

emodbus_response_server_id.tooltip: Get the slave ID of the current response

emodbus_response_function_code.tooltip: Get the function code of the current response

emodbus_response_length.tooltip: Get the number of data bytes in the current response

emodbus_error_code.tooltip: Get the error code of the current error

emodbus_error_message.tooltip: Get the human-readable error message of the current error

emodbus_rtu_server_create.message0: Create Modbus RTU server %1 Timeout %2 ms RS485 control pin %3

emodbus_rtu_server_begin.message0: Start RTU server %1 Serial port %2 Baud rate %3 RX pin %4 TX pin %5

emodbus_tcp_server_create.message0: Create Modbus TCP server %1 Port %2 Maximum number of clients %3

emodbus_server_register_fc03.message0: Server %1 Register read holding register processing Slave ID %2
emodbus_server_register_fc03.tooltip: Register the processing function for reading the holding register (FC03)

emodbus_server_register_fc06.message0: Server %1 registers writing to a single register processing slave ID %2
emodbus_server_register_fc06.tooltip: Register a handler function for writing to a single holding register (FC06)

emodbus_server_add_response_data.tooltip: Adds a 16-bit data to the server response

emodbus_server_set_error.tooltip: Set server response to error response

emodbus_client_pending_requests.tooltip: Get the number of pending requests in the queue
